Module re_viewer::external::re_chunk::external::re_log_types::external::re_types_core::archetypes

source ·
Expand description

Fundamental Archetypes that are implemented in re_types_core directly for convenience and dependency optimization.

There are also re-exported by re_types.

Structs§

  • Clear
    Archetype: Empties all the components of an entity.
